title: EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive, Multipurpose, High-Strength Adhesive, Bonds Instantly on Contact, Fast Drying, 30g Tube
features: High strength, multipurpose adhesive that bonds instantly on contact
Powerful enough to bond most materials, including non-porous surfaces e.g. metal to metal
The ideal adhesive for DIY tasks and emergency repairs
Suitable materials: Wood, MDF, laminate, metal, PVC, cork, leather, rubber, glass, mirror, stone, and ceramics
Contents: 1x EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive, Multipurpose, High-Strength Adhesive, Bonds Instantly on Contact, Fast Drying, 30g Tube
description: From the manufacturer EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive Tube High strength, fast drying, no need for support EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive is a high strength, multipurpose adhesive that bonds instantly on contact. It's powerful enough to bond most types of materials, and will even fix non-porous surfaces together e.g. metal to metal, making it ideal for a wide range of DIY tasks and household repairs. Suitable materials Ideal for bonding wood, MDF, laminate, metal, PVC, cork, leather, rubber, glass, mirror, stone, and ceramics. Not suitable for use on polystyrene, cellulose paint, vinyl, polythene, polypropylene and rayon fabrics. Coverage One surface coat: 0.1m2 per 30g tube. Advantages at a glance: High strength, multipurpose adhesive that bonds instantly on contact No need for clamping or support Powerful enough to bond most materials, even non-porous surfaces like metal The ideal adhesive for DIY tasks and emergency repairs Suitable for wood, MDF, laminate, metal, PVC, leather, rubber and more EVO-STIK Impact Adhesive EVO-STIK Adhesive Cleaner EVO-STIK Grip Filth
